summary: Tested Daily Scorecard and Clickable Tiles features on Performance page. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all tiles clickable and detail modals opening correctly. Fixed a bug in the detail endpoint where timestamps from engagement_signals were already ISO strings.

frontend_tests.daily_scorecard: PASSED - Shows today's touchpoints (46), yesterday comparison (61), diff (-15), trend arrow, motivational message
frontend_tests.period_filters: PASSED - Today, This Week, This Month buttons visible and functional
frontend_tests.communication_tiles: PASSED - TEXTS SENT, EMAILS, CALLS clickable, open detail modal
frontend_tests.sharing_tiles: PASSED - MY CARD, REVIEWS, CARD SHARES, SHOWCASE clickable
frontend_tests.engagement_tiles: PASSED - Link Clicks, Email Opens, Replies, New Leads clickable
frontend_tests.click_through_rows: PASSED - Digital Card Views, Review Link Clicks, Showcase Views, Link Page Visits all clickable with chevron indicators

1_daily_scorecard: GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance returns scorecard object with today, yesterday, diff fields
Scorecard shows today's count vs yesterday with trend indicator (up/down arrow)
Motivational message changes based on comparison (ahead/on pace/behind)
Scorecard always shows today vs yesterday regardless of period filter
2_showcase_sharing: GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance returns sharing.showcase field counting showroom_shared events
SHOWCASE tile visible in Sharing section on frontend
3_new_leads_clickable: Events have event_type=new_lead, contact_name, contact_id, content (source), timestamp
New Leads tile in Engagement section is clickable and opens detail modal
4_click_through_details: digital_card_views: Returns card_viewed and digital_card_viewed events from both contact_events and engagement_signals
showcase_views: Returns showcase_viewed and showroom_viewed events
All CtrRow tiles are clickable with chevron indicators
5_detail_modal: All StatCard tiles (Communication, Sharing) open detail modal on click
All EngCard tiles (Engagement section) open detail modal on click
All CtrRow tiles (Click-Through Breakdown) open detail modal on click
Modal shows list of events with contact name, event label, timestamp, chevron to contact

bug_fixed.issue: digital_card_views detail endpoint returning 500 Internal Server Error
bug_fixed.root_cause: timestamps from engagement_signals were already ISO strings but code tried calling .isoformat() again
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Line 612 in tasks.py: Added check hasattr(e['timestamp'], 'isoformat') before calling isoformat()

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance page Daily Scorecard and Clickable Tiles features fully verified. All StatCards (Communication, Sharing including new Showcase), EngCards (Engagement including New Leads), and CtrRows (Click-Through Breakdown) are clickable and open detail modals. The detail endpoint pulls from both contact_events AND engagement_signals collections. Fixed a timestamp serialization bug in the detail endpoint.
